process.commandLine: set -e; ACTUAL_PWD=$(pwd); [ "$ACTUAL_PWD" = "/etc" ] || { echo "FAIL cwd: got '$ACTUAL_PWD', want '/etc'" >&2; exit 11; }; [ "${MXC_TEST_FOO:-}" = "bar baz" ] || { echo "FAIL env MXC_TEST_FOO: got '${MXC_TEST_FOO:-<unset>}', want 'bar baz'" >&2; exit 12; }; [ "${MXC_TEST_EQ:-}" = "a=b=c" ] || { echo "FAIL env MXC_TEST_EQ: got '${MXC_TEST_EQ:-<unset>}', want 'a=b=c'" >&2; exit 13; }; echo "OK cwd=$ACTUAL_PWD MXC_TEST_FOO=$MXC_TEST_FOO MXC_TEST_EQ=$MXC_TEST_EQ"
